---
title: "About"
---

<div class="about-container">

<div class="about-image">
  <img src="images/profile_rijkslib.jpg" alt="Fuminari Miura">
</div>

<div class="about-text">

I am a researcher working at the intersection of infectious disease modelling and theoretical epidemiology.

My work focuses on understanding how transmission processes unfold across heterogeneous populations and how mathematical theory can inform practical control strategies.

I am particularly interested in:

- structural properties of transmission systems  
- network and multi-layer epidemic models  
- time-varying dominance of transmission routes  
- reduced-order representations of complex epidemic dynamics  

I aim to bridge epidemic theory and real-world decision making through parsimonious, interpretable models.
You can find my CV [here](cv.html). 
</div>

</div>
